name: Punk
description: Punk is a common Mechromancer class mod in Borderlands 2, made by Bandit. It is part of the Mechromancer Pack and can drop at random from most appropriate loot sources.
notes: All Punk variants reduce magazine size by at least 1 round. This can drop a weapon to 0 magazine capacity, making some guns unusable, including Infinity, Longrider, Striker, and Coach Gun.

special.description: At max level, Punk provides +46% fire rate and -29% magazine size. Known issue: the item card may show an incorrect fire rate value.
